jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Craftsvilla - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Craftsvilla invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Marketplace Manager at our Varanasi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Craftsvilla:
Craftsvilla is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Shopify

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Craftsvilla!
